meta.title: Package settlements - Admin
meta.description: Review package money that is held, ready to release, under review, or already released.
meta.detailDescription: Inspect one package settlement, its release readiness, and its review history.

title: Package settlements
note: Review held package money and release practitioner payouts when sessions are complete.

states.emptyNote: Package settlements will appear here once package purchases are collected and tracked.

detailError.heading: Package settlement is not available right now
detailError.note: Could not load this package settlement.

notFound.heading: Package settlement was not found
notFound.note: This package settlement is not available in the current admin scope.

modal.title: Confirm payout release
modal.description: This will release the held practitioner amount for the selected package settlement.
modal.note: The payout will be added to the practitioner wallet after confirmation.

errors.notFound: This package settlement could not be found.
errors.notReady: This package settlement is not ready for release yet.
errors.empty: There is nothing to release for this package settlement.
errors.invalidAmount: This package settlement has an invalid amount.
errors.currencyMissing: This package settlement is missing a currency.
errors.snapshotMissing: This package settlement is missing required snapshot data.
errors.needsReview: This package cannot be released automatically. It needs admin review.
errors.generic: Could not complete this package settlement action right now.

detail.title: Package settlement detail
detail.note: Review the package hold, release readiness, and simple review notes.
detail.releasedNote: This package payout has already been released.

sections.amountsNote: Hold, release, and usage amounts in the package settlement.
